# Adorzia

> Pakistan's first fashion entrepreneurship ecosystem

## About

Adorzia is building the growth architecture Pakistani fashion entrepreneurs have never had. Founded in 2025, we provide:

- **Coworking Studios** - Premium creative spaces in Karachi, Lahore, and Islamabad (Opening 2026)
- **Curated Marketplace** - Connecting independent designers with international buyers
- **Spotlight Program** - Annual talent investment event discovering Pakistan's next great fashion brands

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://adorzia.com/) - Main landing page
- [About](https://adorzia.com/about) - Our story, mission, and team
- [For Creatives](https://adorzia.com/for-creatives) - Resources for fashion designers
- [For Partners](https://adorzia.com/for-partners) - Partnership opportunities
- [Spotlight Event](https://adorzia.com/spotlight-event) - Annual talent investment program
- [Marketplace](https://adorzia.com/marketplace) - Curated designer marketplace
- [Contact](https://adorzia.com/contact) - Get in touch

## Spotlight Applications

Applications for Spotlight 2026 are open until July 31, 2026. Selected designers receive funding, mentorship, and a platform to launch their brand internationally.

[Apply for Spotlight 2026](https://adorzia.com/spotlight/apply)

## Contact

- **Email**: hello@adorzia.com
- **Instagram**: [@adorziaofficial](https://www.instagram.com/adorziaofficial/)
- **LinkedIn**: [Adorzia](https://www.linkedin.com/company/adorzia/)

## Technical

- Built with React, TypeScript, and Vite
- Hosted on Vercel
- Designed for accessibility and performance (90+ Lighthouse score)
